violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as hamburger patties) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as fresh produce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Food items were rearranged during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of facilities shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of facilities shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024
